title: Docs Viewer Management
content_html:
Docs Viewer Management

This archived planning/reference page now acts as the index for the Docs Viewer management-mode split. The current implementation is complete for the confirmed local workflow, and the detailed contract has been moved into child references for easier search and review.

Current Status

Implemented management mode covers:

  • local-only /docs/?mode=manage availability through the standalone Docs Viewer service
  • active-scope management for Studio, Library, and Analysis from /docs/
  • create, import, metadata edit, status edit, viewability, move, normalize order, archive, delete, settings, source-open, copy-link, and rebuild actions
  • dedicated client-side management modules under docs-viewer/runtime/js/
  • local write service backing through Docs Management Service

Child References

  • Current State lists implemented phases, management UI/module responsibilities, unavailable items, and follow-on candidates.
  • Contract preserves the original management-mode goals, scope, guardrails, and phase-1 contract.
  • Write Model records command semantics, builder implications, non-goals, phases, and decisions.
